seed.research/reading-notes.md:
# Reading notes

One section per paper. Keep quotes short and always note the page number.

## Attention Is All You Need (2017)

- Key idea: replace recurrence entirely with self-attention.
- Relevance to our work: baseline for the ablation in §4.
seed.prompts/summarize-paper.md: You are a research assistant. Summarize the paper I give you in five bullets: problem, method, key result, limitation, and relevance to our project. End with three follow-up papers worth reading.
